title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 31–33, this part focuses on Unknown person #28, Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #29, Unknown person #30 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: As fuckin' politely as you please.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: You sure laid out that arrogant woman!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you saying? I'd never hurt a woman.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: I just served her some delicious food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that kid... I don't think I can keep him cooped up in this place

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Now, then, Esteemed guests and patrons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Sanji! Bring this to table S!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: There's a ship sailing towards us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, if they're ready to pay, we're ready to serve!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What's this? That's a weird jolly Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Why's it wearing a straw hat?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 19 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
